label: Google - Senior Software Engineer
jobDescription:
We're looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Search team at Google.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement scalable backend systems serving billions of users
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams on complex distributed systems
- Lead technical design discussions and code reviews
- Mentor junior engineers

Requirements:
- 5+ years of software engineering experience
- Strong knowledge of distributed systems and algorithms
- Experience with large-scale data processing (MapReduce, Spark, etc.)
- Excellent problem-solving skills
- BS/MS in Computer Science or equivalent experience
- Proficiency in C++, Java, Python, or Go

Nice to have:
- Experience with search/ranking systems
- Published papers or open-source contributions
- Experience with machine learning systems
resumeText:
John Doe
Senior Software Engineer
john.doe@example.com | (555) 123-4567 | linkedin.com/in/johndoe

SUMMARY
Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience building scalable distributed systems. Proven track record of leading cross-functional teams and improving system performance.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | Tech Corp | 2020-Present
- Led team of 5 engineers building microservices architecture serving 10M+ daily users
- Reduced API latency by 40% through caching and query optimization
- Designed and implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deployment time by 60%
- Mentored 3 junior engineers and conducted technical interviews

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | 2018-2020
- Built full-stack web applications using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL
- Maintained 99.9% uptime through proactive monitoring and incident response
- Implemented real-time data pipeline processing 1M events/day

Software Engineer Intern | BigTech Inc | Summer 2017
- Developed internal tools for engineering productivity
- Contributed to open-source projects with 1000+ stars

SKILLS
Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, C++
Frameworks: React, Node.js, Express, FastAPI, gRPC
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, DynamoDB
Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS), GCP, Kubernetes, Docker
Tools: Git, Jenkins, Terraform, Prometheus, Grafana

EDUCATION
BS Computer Science | State University | 2018
- GPA: 3.8/4.0
- Relevant coursework: Distributed Systems, Algorithms, Machine Learning

PROJECTS
Distributed Cache System (2022)
- Built a Redis-compatible distributed cache with consistent hashing
- Open-sourced, 500+ GitHub stars

label: Meta - Backend Engineer
jobDescription:
Meta is hiring Backend Engineers for our Infrastructure team to help build the next generation of social platforms.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain backend services that power Meta's core products
- Optimize systems for scale, reliability, and performance
- Work closely with product teams to deliver new features
- Participate in on-call rotations

Requirements:
- 3+ years of backend development experience
- Proficiency in C++, Java, or Hack/PHP
- Experience with high-traffic distributed systems
- Strong understanding of databases and caching
- Familiarity with microservices architecture
- BS in Computer Science or equivalent

Nice to have:
- Experience with GraphQL
- Knowledge of React/React Native
- Open-source contributions

label: Amazon - Full Stack Engineer
jobDescription:
Join Amazon Web Services (AWS) as a Full Stack Engineer working on developer tools used by millions of customers worldwide.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain full-stack web applications
- Design RESTful APIs and frontend interfaces
- Collaborate with UX designers and product managers
- Write high-quality, maintainable code with comprehensive tests
- Participate in code reviews and architectural discussions

Requirements:
- 3+ years of full-stack development experience
- Expertise in React, TypeScript, and Node.js
- Strong database design skills (SQL and NoSQL)
- Experience with AWS services (Lambda, DynamoDB, S3)
- Passion for building scalable, customer-facing systems
- Strong communication and collaboration skills

Amazon Leadership Principles knowledge is a plus.
